name: Cinnamon extract
summary: Decision-ready summary: Cinnamon extract is best framed for blood glucose support; insulin sensitivity support; safety screen: liver disease; anticoagulant medication caution; pregnancy high-dose caution.
description: Cinnamon extract supports glucose metabolism, plausibly via insulin sensitivity and carbohydrate handling; evidence is mixed but mechanistic signals are relevant.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
